works: CLI `shardloom route <sql|python|dataframe|cli> --format json`, `ShardLoomContext.route(...)`, SQL workflow `.route()`, and DataFrame workflow `.route()` return the same side-effect-free route envelope for equivalent local requests.
blocked: The facade is admission metadata only. It does not execute queries, read data, write sinks, refresh benchmark timing, or claim broad SQL/DataFrame runtime support.
